title: calliandra mollicula
intro: Calliandra mollicula is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the "powder puff tree" or "Mexican bird of paradise" due to its unique, puffy, pink or red flower clusters resembling birds in flight. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calliandra mollicula include its ability to treat various ailments, such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve cardiovascular health. Calliandra mollicula can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
